title: mentha × villosa var. similis
intro: Mentha × villosa var. similis, also known as Corsican mint or small leaved mint, is a variety of the Mentha villosa plant, a hybrid of mint and a member of the Lamiaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and digestive aid, due to its high concentration of menthol and other essential oils. The health benefits of Mentha × villosa var. similis include relief from digestive issues, headaches, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to help reduce stress and improve respiratory function. This plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and essential oil infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
